feedback.text: Hello! Please consider ensuring video games are included in this act as a lot of game developers/publishers create games which people buy to play, but than later when game developers/publishers shut down servers, people no longer have the possibility of playing those games even though they paid money. Imagine if you bought a movie on Blu-ray or DVD to watch whenever you wanted to, but the company that made the movie tells you to delete/destroy the movie or to give back the movie you bought. I want to own the entertainment I buy! Movies, games, books, music! I bought it, I should own it!
